steps.title: Identify the task
steps.content: The sentence has an independent clause ending with a comma: Okie-Tex takes place in an area with low light pollution, followed by a blank and then dark skies and ideal stargazing conditions. The blank must connect the main clause to the phrase that follows without creating a run-on or comma splice.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'ensuring': a present participle that forms a supplementary modifier attached to the main clause — grammatically correct and no extra subject or finite verb is introduced. ✓
  • Choice B — 'this will ensure': adds a pronoun and a finite verb, creating a comma splice (two independent clauses joined only by a comma). ✗
  • Choice C — 'ensures': a finite verb with no subject, producing an ungrammatical sentence. ✗
  • Choice D — 'it ensures': adds a pronoun and a finite verb, creating a comma splice just like choice B. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
